candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Adjustment line, not the reported total current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash balance; preferred over cash-flow beginning/end balances and over restricted cash.
Cash-related but restricted; not the standard CHE definition.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash-flow statement ending balance can reconcile to CHE, but balance-sheet cash line is preferred.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash line, not restricted cash.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities.
Balancing/adjustment line, not the reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best IFRS-style match for short-term debt/current borrowings; excludes trade payables and is separate from lease liabilities.
Would fit current portion of long-term debt, but appears not populated in the preview.
Potential short-term debt label, but appears unpopulated and less clearly the reported current debt total here.

variables.notes: Chose a confident label outside the STD candidate shortlist because it is the clearest reported short-term debt line. Excluded 'Current lease liabilities' per instructions. The sheet shows this label twice; selected the label once as the intended reported line.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Best reported total for property, plant and equipment / tangible fixed assets; preferred over component lines and gross values.
Gross tangible assets, but net total is preferred when available.
Only a component of total tangible assets, not total PPE.

variables.notes: Used total net tangible assets as the closest balance-sheet PPE measure.

candidates.row_label: Net cash from/used in operating activities
candidates.why: Direct operating cash flow / net cash from operating activities line; preferable to 'Cash Generated from Operations' because it includes the final net operating cash flow after interest/taxes where presented.
Intermediate subtotal within operating cash flow, not the final net operating cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Cash Generated from Operations - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not the reported cash flow total.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash from/used in operating activities

variables.notes: Chose a confident label outside the shortlist because it is the standard final operating cash flow line and superior to the subtotal 'Cash Generated from Operations'.
